'''yadhuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cecropin|cecropin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-dh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cecropin|cecropin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yadhuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yædhihith|yædhihith]] || [[word:yædhihij|yædhihij]] || [[word:yædhihish|yædhihish]] || [[word:yædhihi|yædhihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yadhudhuhuth|yadhudhuhuth]] || [[word:yadhudhuhuj|yadhudhuhuj]] || [[word:yadhudhuhush|yadhudhuhush]] || [[word:yadhudhuhu|yadhudhuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yadhuhuth|yadhuhuth]] || [[word:yadhuhuj|yadhuhuj]] || [[word:yadhuhush|yadhuhush]] || [[word:yadhuhu|yadhuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yadhufhuth|yadhufhuth]] || [[word:yadhufhuj|yadhufhuj]] || [[word:yadhufhush|yadhufhush]] || [[word:yadhufhuf|yadhufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yadhuhuthu|yadhuhuthu]] || [[word:yadhuhuju|yadhuhuju]] || [[word:yadhuhushu|yadhuhushu]] || [[word:yadhuhuku|yadhuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yadhuhuth|yadhuhuth]] || [[word:yadhuhuj|yadhuhuj]] || [[word:yadhuhush|yadhuhush]] || [[word:yadhuhu|yadhuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yadhuhuthul|yadhuhuthul]] || [[word:yadhuhujul|yadhuhujul]] || [[word:yadhuhushul|yadhuhushul]] || [[word:yadhuhukul|yadhuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yadhuhuthuthu|yadhuhuthuthu]] || [[word:yadhuhujuju|yadhuhujuju]] || [[word:yadhuhushushu|yadhuhushushu]] || [[word:yadhuhuku|yadhuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yadhuhuthun|yadhuhuthun]] || [[word:yadhuhujun|yadhuhujun]] || [[word:yadhuhushun|yadhuhushun]] || [[word:yadhuhukun|yadhuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yadhuhuthuoro|yadhuhuthuoro]] || [[word:yadhuhujuoro|yadhuhujuoro]] || [[word:yadhuhushuoro|yadhuhushuoro]] || [[word:yadhuhukuoro|yadhuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
